intentSynonyms: list all schedules in the namespace in temporal
list all schedules in a namespace in temporal
description: List all schedules in a namespace. Shows schedule IDs, workflow types, intervals/crons, recent action counts, and next scheduled times.

namespace.description: Temporal namespace (e.g., "prod-us-west-2.abc123"). Defaults to the namespace in the current browser tab.

next_page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response
